_meta.title: WEO Atlas Guided Journeys — single source of truth
_meta.purpose: Defines the operator-selected guided journeys ONCE. Consumed by atlas.html (clickable landing questions) and by the Worker MCP server (prompts + getting-started resource). Edit here only; the two surfaces read this file so they cannot drift.
_meta.spec: WS-8 Atlas Guided Journeys (WEO_WS8_ATLAS_GUIDED_JOURNEYS_BUILD_SPEC_V1.md); journeys from WEO_WS8_SELECTED_JOURNEYS_V1.md; corrections per Session J audit (7 July 2026).
_meta.discipline: V1.4 methodology — question wording is RELATIONAL, readouts are DESCRIPTIVE (counts + named entities only, never causal/interpretive).
_meta.served_at: https://warmthengine.com/guided-journeys.json (Pages). Worker fetches the apex host directly; www 301-redirects to apex. No consumer reads a KV copy.
_meta.counts: Readout {placeholders} are filled by the LIVE journey at click time — never hard-code. A2 counts downstream NODES (traverse_coordination descendants — identical set to the Atlas trace for this root). B1 counts thread RECORDS ({n}) and distinct facilities ({f}) from get_threads inbound[]. C1 uses get_event_stack counts verbatim ({coord}/{mat}/{cap}; material is event-PAIRS — the record-vs-pair distinction between B1 and C1 is deliberate).
_meta.traversal_note: Journey shape is defined by mode + root only; each journey's named MCP call reproduces the rendered set exactly. There are no per-journey filter parameters — earlier params blocks documented filters neither the Atlas nor the Worker applied, and were removed in 1.0.3.
_meta.chain_dependency: Journeys are pinned to stable anchor chains (E93 spine; E196 NVIDIA hub; E200→E177 METI funding spine). A future loop that re-shapes these chains must refresh this file. Anchors chosen for durability per the curation pass.

journeys.title: China generative-AI regulatory cascade
journeys.question: What generative-AI services and rules cascade from China's Algorithm Recommendation Provisions?
journeys.readout: China's foundational AI provisions — a regulatory-enablement cascade (CC-V/CC-E) feeding {n} downstream provisions and services, running through the Interim Measures and Deep Synthesis provisions to Baidu ERNIE Bot, Doubao, the AI Content Labelling Measures, and TC260's security requirements.
journeys._fallback_readout: China's foundational AI provisions — a regulatory-enablement cascade (CC-V/CC-E) terminating in {n} downstream services and rules: Baidu ERNIE Bot, Doubao, the AI Content Labelling Measures, and TC260's security requirements. (Use with count_source coordination_downstream_leaves if the Atlas guidedCounts addition is deferred.)

journeys.title: NVIDIA accelerator deployment hub
journeys.question: Which supercomputers, data centres, and AI models run on NVIDIA's accelerators, and on which chip generation?
journeys.readout: NVIDIA AI Accelerator Series — {n} material (deploys / trains-on) links from {f} Western facilities (Stargate, JUPITER, Isambard-AI, Fairwater 2, Tesla Cortex, Meta, EuroHPC Leonardo…), spanning NVIDIA generations from A100 to GB300.

journeys.title: Japan's subsidised GPU cloud across all layers
journeys.question: Which coordination, hardware, and capability layers meet at Sakura Internet's Ishikari GPU cloud?
journeys.readout: Sakura Internet Ishikari GPU Cloud — {coord} coordination connections (METI's Specified Critical Cloud funding flow, the ABCI 3.0 framework family, and parallel-policy peers), {mat} material link naming NVIDIA H100, H200 and B200, and {cap} capability waypoint (Japan, D4 AI compute).
